text.title: Testing Patterns (Cross-Language) Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether testing-patterns applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Does this codebase have a written test strategy?

branch.when: yes and ≥3 tests duplicate input setup
UI tests exist without page objects

example.description: When `no` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
